creator: dwmalone@maths.tcd.ie
text:
On Mon, Aug 21, 2000 at 09:22:56PM -0700, warp@ms2.hinet.net wrote:

Are you sure you recompiled both your kernel did a "make world" in
/usr/src? This is the usual source of these problems. (It can also
be caused by not using the loader to boot your kernel, but I don't
think this is the problem from the error messages).

	David.
